component.name: KeepAlive
component.summary: Keep your system awake — prevent sleep and screen lock

description.p: KeepAlive is a lightweight, cross-platform system tray application that prevents your computer from sleeping or locking. It wraps the KeepAlive Go CLI under the hood, providing a convenient menu bar / system tray interface with configurable timers, battery thresholds, and activity simulation.

ul.li: Prevent system sleep indefinitely or with a timer
Stop when battery drops below a configurable threshold
Simulate user activity to keep chat apps active
Runs quietly in the system tray / menu bar

screenshot.caption: KeepAlive popup panel in the system tray

description.p: Initial release of the KeepAlive Flutter menu bar app.
